race.description: Cannon Accounting & Taxation CB Mdn Plate
race.comment: DON'T SAY DO (7) returns and has been readied with a handy Muswellbrook trial. Form at the beginning of last prep stacks right up for this and with any improvement during the break she's a strong chance to get off the mark. IDOL BYE (8) was well fancied on debut last start and was not far off the mark, finishing a long neck away in second over 1100m at Armidale. Is sure to have come on from that and rates one of the main hopes. RUAIRI (5) carries a fitness edge and while he's yet to really threaten, this looks his best chance to date. Nock's booking adds confidence. SPELLECAST (6) missed by a lip at start two before spelling. Is a likely improver in his second prep and is worth keeping in mind.
